title: Model Testing - AI Data Trainer @ DataAnnotation

about.status: Currently training agentic AI models at DataAnnotation.tech

highlights.text: AI model trainer at DataAnnotation.tech - Analyzing and evaluating agentic AI models with autonomous or interactive multi-turn reasoning, tool-use decisions, and task execution flows. Skilled in ensuring consistency and identifying failure modes in agent behavior.
Worked closely with project managers at Nowcom and their partners Westlake Financial and Western Funding Inc. to deliver quality solutions based on their needs.
Spearheaded the end-to-end migration of a Seafarers Assessment Desktop Application to a scalable web-based platform, enabling support for thousands of online test sessions per month.
